---
title: "SC Monitoring & Cohort Analysis"
author: "BPJS Kediri Analytics"
format:
  pptx:
    slide-level: 1
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# SETUP

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(bigrquery)
library(DBI)
library(scales)

project_id <- "bpjs-kediri"

con <- dbConnect(
  bigquery(),
  project = project_id,
  dataset = "mart_prod",
  billing = project_id
)

persalinan <- tbl(con, "persalinan_clean") %>% collect()
sequence_data <- tbl(con, "persalinan_sequence") %>% collect()
provider <- tbl(con, "provider_risk_overall") %>%
  collect() %>%
  filter(total_delivery >= 30)

persalinan <- persalinan %>%
  mutate(tahun = format(as.Date(tgl_pulang), "%Y"))
```

# SLIDE 1 — GAMBARAN UTILISASI PERSALINAN

```{r}
util_summary <- persalinan %>%
  group_by(tahun) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    total_sc = sum(metode_clean == "SC"),
    sc_rate = total_sc / total
  )

ggplot(util_summary, aes(x = tahun, y = sc_rate, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Tren SC Rate Tahunan",
    y = "SC Rate",
    x = "Tahun"
  )
```

```{r}
latest <- tail(util_summary, 1)

cat(paste0(
"• Total persalinan tahun terakhir: ", latest$total, "\n",
"• SC rate terakhir: ", round(latest$sc_rate*100,1), "%\n",
"• Perubahan dibanding tahun awal: ",
round((latest$sc_rate - util_summary$sc_rate[1])*100,1),
" poin persentase."
))
```

# SLIDE 2 — COHORT & INTERVAL KELAHIRAN

```{r}
interval_dist <- sequence_data %>%
  count(kategori_interval) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n))

ggplot(interval_dist,
       aes(x = reorder(kategori_interval, -pct), y = pct)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribusi Interval Kelahiran",
    x = "",
    y = "Proporsi"
  )
```

```{r}
bi_impossible <- interval_dist %>%
  filter(kategori_interval == "BIOLOGICALLY IMPOSSIBLE") %>%
  pull(pct)

cat(paste0(
"• Biologically impossible: ",
round(bi_impossible*100,2), "% dari cohort\n",
"• Potensi: double claim / coding error / fragmentasi episode"
))
```

# SLIDE 3 — SC RATE & OUTLIER ANALYSIS

```{r}
mean_sc <- mean(provider$sc_rate)
sd_sc <- sd(provider$sc_rate)

provider <- provider %>%
  mutate(
    z_score = (sc_rate - mean_sc) / sd_sc,
    outlier = abs(z_score) > 2
  )

overall_rate <- sum(provider$total_sc) /
                sum(provider$total_delivery)

provider <- provider %>%
  mutate(
    se = sqrt((overall_rate * (1 - overall_rate)) / total_delivery),
    upper_95 = overall_rate + 1.96 * se,
    lower_95 = overall_rate - 1.96 * se
  ) %>%
  arrange(total_delivery)

ggplot(provider,
       aes(x = total_delivery, y = sc_rate)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = outlier), size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = upper_95), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = lower_95), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = overall_rate) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Funnel Plot SC Rate",
    x = "Volume Persalinan",
    y = "SC Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
outlier_n <- sum(provider$outlier)

cat(paste0(
"• Jumlah RS outlier (|z| > 2): ", outlier_n, "\n",
"• Variasi antar RS signifikan\n",
"• Perlu clinical review pada RS di luar batas kontrol"
))
```

# SLIDE 4 — IMPLIKASI MUTU & BIAYA

```{r}
cost_summary <- persalinan %>%
  summarise(
    total_cost = sum(biayaverifikasi, na.rm = TRUE),
    sc_cost = sum(biayaverifikasi[metode_clean == "SC"], na.rm = TRUE),
    spontan_cost = sum(biayaverifikasi[metode_clean == "SPONTAN"], na.rm = TRUE)
  )

cost_summary
```

```{r}
cat("
• SC berkontribusi besar terhadap total biaya
• Variasi antar fasilitas lebar
• Terdapat interval biologis tidak mungkin
• Disarankan:
   - Clinical review berbasis kasus
   - Audit rekam medis sampling
   - Validasi indikasi SC
   - Evaluasi pola rujukan FKTP → RS
")
```


### 1️⃣ RS Penyumbang Biologically Impossible Terbesar

```{r}
top_rs <- sequence_data %>%
  filter(kategori_interval == "BIOLOGICALLY IMPOSSIBLE") %>%
  count(provider_name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  head(10)

top_rs
```
